background: Table 18.7 is based on results from the Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance (YRBS) system. The number of adolescents who had been in a car or other vehicle when the driver had been drinking alcohol is cross tabulated according to racial/ethnic group classifications.

task.query: Calculate prevalences proportions for each of the groups.
Determine the margin of error for each proportion according to this formula: m ≈ 2 ⋅ SE_{p_i}, where SE_{̂{p}_i}=√{̂{p}_i ̂{q}_i/n_i}
